title: Energizing Venezuelan Chickpeas Bowl
description: A garlicky, crunchy bowl of chickpeas seasoned with red chilli powder and baked to perfection, perfect for a quick, macrobiotic-friendly lunch.
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas, pat them dry with a clean towel.
In a bowl, combine chickpeas with olive oil, minced garlic, red chilli powder, ground cumin, sea salt, and black pepper until evenly coated.
Spread the seasoned chickpeas on a baking sheet in a single layer and bake at 200°C for 20 minutes, tossing halfway through for even browning.
Remove the baked chickpeas from the oven and let them cool slightly.
Transfer the chickpeas to a serving bowl and add lemon zest, fresh lemon juice, chopped parsley, toasted sunflower seeds, and toasted pumpkin seeds.
Gently toss the bowl to combine all ingredients and spread the dressing through the mixture.
Taste the bowl and adjust seasoning with additional salt or chilli powder if desired.
Serve immediately for a crunchy, energizing meal.
